response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to agentic workflows at re:cinq, but lacks demonstrable leadership in scaling AI systems in regulated fintech environments, has no explicit experience with financial infrastructure or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph, and his leadership roles are not clearly defined as executive or technical-architect level.
strengths: Hands-on experience with agentic workflows and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven track record in distributed systems, real-time data, and event-driven architectures
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication via workshops and talks
concerns: No clear evidence of 5+ years in senior technical leadership at a scale-up
Lacks demonstrated experience in fintech, credit risk, or regulated AI deployment
No mention of managing teams beyond 10 people or governing hybrid engineering models
